question_intent: The total sales revenue for customers in the Eastern region who placed orders in the first quarter of 1997

plan.question_intent: The total sales revenue for customers in the Eastern region who placed orders in the first quarter of 1997
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS order_total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid JOIN employeeterritories et ON c.customerid = et.employeeid JOIN region r ON et.territoryid = r.regionid WHERE r.regiondescription = 'Eastern' AND o.orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-03-31' GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS order_total
join_clauses: JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate
blocks.notes: This block retrieves the customer ID, company name, order ID, order date, and total order value for all orders placed by customers in the Eastern region during the first quarter of 1997

blocks.notes: This block calculates the total sales revenue for customers in the Eastern region who placed orders in the first quarter of 1997

build_logs.notes: This block retrieves the customer ID, company name, order ID, order date, and total order value for all orders placed by customers in the Eastern region during the first quarter of 1997

steps.clause: JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (o.orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-03-31')
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS order_total
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (o.orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-03-31')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the total sales revenue for customers in the Eastern region who placed orders in the first quarter of 1997

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS order_total
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (o.orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-03-31')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(order_total) AS total_sales
FROM (SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS order_total
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN [order details] od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (o.orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-03-31')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT contactname
FROM (SELECT c.contactname, o.orderid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_order_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997' GROUP BY c.contactname, o.orderid ORDER BY total_order_value DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(product_sales)
FROM (SELECT p.productid, p.productname, SUM(od.quantity * od.unitprice) AS product_sales
FROM products p
JOIN "order details" od ON p.productid = od.productid
JOIN categories c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages')
GROUP BY p.productid, p.productname) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total sales amount for all orders placed between January 1, 1997, and March 31, 1997?
